requirement_topic.en: EPRA Energy Efficiency Label — Air Conditioners and Heat Pumps
requirement_topic.zh: EPRA能效标签——空调器与热泵
requirement_topic.zht: EPRA能效標籤——空調器與熱泵

summary.en: The Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA) administers Kenya's energy efficiency labelling scheme for air conditioners and heat pumps. Regulated products must carry an EPRA-approved energy efficiency label disclosing the energy efficiency ratio (EER) or coefficient of performance (COP), annual energy consumption, and star rating. Labels must be affixed before sale in Kenya and must reflect performance tested at conditions applicable to the Kenyan grid (240 V, 50 Hz). Importers are responsible for registering products with EPRA and obtaining label authorisation.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚能源和石油监管局（EPRA）负责管理空调器和热泵的能效标签制度。受管制产品在肯尼亚销售前须粘贴EPRA批准的能效标签，标注能效比（EER）或性能系数（COP）、年能耗及星级评定。标签须反映在肯尼亚电网条件（240 V、50 Hz）下测试所得的性能数据。进口商负责向EPRA注册产品并获得标签授权。
summary.zht: 肯尼亞能源和石油監管局（EPRA）負責管理空調器和熱泵的能效標籤制度。受管制產品在肯尼亞銷售前須黏貼EPRA批准的能效標籤，標注能效比（EER）或性能係數（COP）、年能耗及星級評定。標籤須反映在肯尼亞電網條件（240 V、50 Hz）下測試所得的性能數據。進口商負責向EPRA註冊產品並獲得標籤授權。

standards_or_laws: EPRA Energy Efficiency Labelling Regulations for Air Conditioners
KS 1957 (Kenya Standard for energy efficiency of air conditioners)

summary.en: China's energy efficiency labelling for heat pumps and air conditioners is administered by the China Energy Label (CEL) scheme under GB 12021.3 (room air conditioners) and GB 25454 (heat pump water heaters). COP and SCOP performance is rated against Chinese test conditions at 220 V, 50 Hz. Chinese energy label ratings and test reports based on GB/T 7725 or GB 25454 are not accepted as equivalent to EPRA labelling, as test conditions, rating scale, and administrative requirements differ.
summary.zh: 中国热泵和空调器的能效标签由中国能效标识（CEL）制度管理，依据GB 12021.3（房间空调器）和GB 25454（热泵热水器）。COP和SCOP性能在220 V、50 Hz的中国测试条件下评定。基于GB/T 7725或GB 25454的中国能效标签评级和测试报告不被视为等同于EPRA标签，因为测试条件、评级标准和行政要求不同。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵和空調器的能效標籤由中國能效標識（CEL）制度管理，依據GB 12021.3（房間空調器）和GB 25454（熱泵熱水器）。COP和SCOP性能在220 V、50 Hz的中國測試條件下評定。基於GB/T 7725或GB 25454的中國能效標籤評級和測試報告不被視為等同於EPRA標籤，因為測試條件、評級標準和行政要求不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.3 (China energy efficiency label — room air conditioners)
GB 25454 (China — heat pump water heaters energy efficiency)
GB/T 7725 (China — room air conditioners test methods)

gap.en: Chinese energy label ratings and test data are not accepted for EPRA labelling. Exporters must obtain EPRA label authorisation with test evidence conducted or accepted under Kenyan conditions (240 V, 50 Hz). The slight voltage difference (220 V CN vs 240 V KE) may affect rated performance values and must be addressed in test reports submitted to EPRA.
gap.zh: 中国能效标签评级和测试数据不被EPRA标签所接受。出口商须提交在肯尼亚条件（240 V、50 Hz）下进行或认可的测试证据，取得EPRA标签授权。轻微的电压差异（中国220 V vs肯尼亚240 V）可能影响额定性能数值，须在提交给EPRA的测试报告中予以说明。
gap.zht: 中國能效標籤評級和測試數據不被EPRA標籤所接受。出口商須提交在肯尼亞條件（240 V、50 Hz）下進行或認可的測試證據，取得EPRA標籤授權。輕微的電壓差異（中國220 V vs肯尼亞240 V）可能影響額定性能數值，須在提交給EPRA的測試報告中予以說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EPRA energy efficiency label required before sale of regulated air conditioners and heat pumps in Kenya
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory China Energy Label (CEL) for domestic Chinese market; not equivalent to EPRA label

source.publisher: Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA), Kenya

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Significant gap — EPRA energy efficiency label authorisation is mandatory for sale in Kenya; Chinese CEL ratings and test data are not accepted; re-testing or test data review at 240 V / 50 Hz conditions required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——EPRA能效标签授权为在肯尼亚销售的强制要求；中国CEL评级和测试数据不被接受；需在240 V / 50 Hz条件下重新测试或审查测试数据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——EPRA能效標籤授權為在肯尼亞銷售的強制要求；中國CEL評級和測試數據不被接受；需在240 V / 50 Hz條件下重新測試或審查測試數據。

requirement_topic.en: EPRA Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) — Heat Pumps and Air Conditioners
requirement_topic.zh: EPRA最低能效标准（MEPS）——热泵与空调器
requirement_topic.zht: EPRA最低能效標準（MEPS）——熱泵與空調器

summary.en: EPRA enforces Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for air conditioners and heat pump products sold in Kenya under the Energy Act 2019. Products that do not meet the applicable MEPS EER or COP threshold may not legally be imported or sold in Kenya. MEPS thresholds are set by EPRA and may be updated periodically. Importers must confirm the current applicable MEPS threshold with EPRA before shipment, as below-threshold products cannot be cleared for sale even with a PVOC certificate.
summary.zh: EPRA依据2019年《能源法》对在肯尼亚销售的空调器和热泵产品实施最低能效标准（MEPS）。不符合适用MEPS能效比（EER）或性能系数（COP）门槛的产品不得合法进口或在肯尼亚销售。MEPS门槛由EPRA设定，可能定期更新。进口商须在装运前向EPRA确认当前适用的MEPS门槛，因为低于门槛的产品即使持有PVOC证书也无法获准销售。
summary.zht: EPRA依據2019年《能源法》對在肯尼亞銷售的空調器和熱泵產品實施最低能效標準（MEPS）。不符合適用MEPS能效比（EER）或性能係數（COP）門檻的產品不得合法進口或在肯尼亞銷售。MEPS門檻由EPRA設定，可能定期更新。進口商須在裝運前向EPRA確認當前適用的MEPS門檻，因為低於門檻的產品即使持有PVOC證書也無法獲准銷售。

standards_or_laws: EPRA Minimum Energy Performance Standards for Air Conditioners
KS 1957 (Kenya Standard — energy efficiency of air conditioners)

summary.en: China's MEPS for room air conditioners and heat pumps are set under GB 21455 (room air conditioners) and GB 29541 (heat pump water heaters). COP and SCOP thresholds are tested at Chinese standard conditions (220 V, 50 Hz, GB/T 7725 test method). Chinese MEPS compliance is assessed on Chinese test conditions and is not directly transferable to Kenyan EPRA MEPS thresholds, which are based on 240 V, 50 Hz conditions.
summary.zh: 中国房间空调器和热泵的MEPS分别依据GB 21455（房间空调器）和GB 29541（热泵热水器）设定。COP和SCOP门槛在中国标准条件（220 V、50 Hz、GB/T 7725测试方法）下测试。中国MEPS合规基于中国测试条件评估，不能直接移植至肯尼亚EPRA MEPS门槛，后者基于240 V、50 Hz条件。
summary.zht: 中國房間空調器和熱泵的MEPS分別依據GB 21455（房間空調器）和GB 29541（熱泵熱水器）設定。COP和SCOP門檻在中國標準條件（220 V、50 Hz、GB/T 7725測試方法）下測試。中國MEPS合規基於中國測試條件評估，不能直接移植至肯尼亞EPRA MEPS門檻，後者基於240 V、50 Hz條件。

standards_or_laws: GB 29541 (China MEPS — heat pump water heaters)
GB/T 7725 (China room air conditioner test methods)

gap.en: Chinese MEPS compliance does not satisfy Kenyan EPRA MEPS requirements. Exporters must confirm current EPRA MEPS thresholds, verify product EER/COP performance at 240 V 50 Hz test conditions, and ensure the product meets the applicable Kenyan threshold before shipment. Below-MEPS products cannot be legally sold in Kenya regardless of PVOC status.
gap.zh: 中国MEPS合规不满足肯尼亚EPRA MEPS要求。出口商须确认当前EPRA MEPS门槛，核实产品在240 V、50 Hz测试条件下的EER/COP性能，并确保产品在装运前符合适用肯尼亚门槛。低于MEPS的产品无论PVOC状态如何均不得在肯尼亚合法销售。
gap.zht: 中國MEPS合規不滿足肯尼亞EPRA MEPS要求。出口商須確認當前EPRA MEPS門檻，核實產品在240 V、50 Hz測試條件下的EER/COP性能，並確保產品在裝運前符合適用肯尼亞門檻。低於MEPS的產品無論PVOC狀態如何均不得在肯尼亞合法銷售。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — products must meet EPRA MEPS threshold before import and sale in Kenya
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory GB MEPS for domestic Chinese market; Chinese MEPS thresholds not equivalent to EPRA MEPS

source.publisher: Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA), Kenya

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Significant gap — EPRA MEPS thresholds must be confirmed and met before import; Chinese MEPS ratings tested at 220 V conditions are not directly transferable; below-MEPS products cannot be legally imported or sold.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——进口前须确认并满足EPRA MEPS门槛；在220 V条件下测试的中国MEPS评级不可直接移植；低于MEPS的产品不得合法进口或销售。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——進口前須確認並滿足EPRA MEPS門檻；在220 V條件下測試的中國MEPS評級不可直接移植；低於MEPS的產品不得合法進口或銷售。
